title: satureja obovata subsp. valentina
intro: Satureja obovata subsp. valentina, also known as Valenian savory, is a subspecies of perennial herb within the Lamiaceae family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Valenian savory include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Valenian savory can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
